home.title: Power Line Hardware & Electrical Safety Products Manufacturer
home.lead: Focused on selected products for distribution line construction, maintenance, EPC projects and power supply channels.
home.sectionLead: First version focuses on five product groups from the Vietnam catalogue.
home.strengthLead: The website presents practical product categories and directs buyers to contact us for technical details.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Hebei Zhenyang Electric Technology Co., Ltd. supplies practical power line hardware, safety signs, protection products and supporting electrical equipment for field projects.
points: Product range focused on Vietnam distribution line projects.
Selected catalogue products only; non-target products are not shown in V1.0.
Technical details can be confirmed according to project requirements.

certificates.title: Certificates
certificates.subtitle: Company qualification materials are available in the catalogue. Detailed certificate files can be provided during inquiry communication.
items: Please contact us for certificate details

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Send product requirements, project drawings or target models. Technical details can be confirmed according to project demand.
contact.addressValue: Beilu Industrial Zone, Liangzhao Town, Renqiu City, Cangzhou, Hebei Province, China

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Five selected product groups for Vietnam-focused promotion.

items.name: Strain Clamp
items.features: Reliable grip, efficient installation and outdoor distribution line use.
items.material: Aluminum alloy body with wedge self-locking or bolted fixing structure by model.
items.application: For 10kV overhead insulated conductor dead-end fixing, terminal fixing and line maintenance.
items.customers: For Vietnam projects, EPC contractors and distributors.
items.details: Confirm model by conductor, tension grade and installation.

items.name: Parallel Groove / Branch Connector Clamp
items.summary: Reference product in current file: JC-41C C-type clamp.
items.features: Low contact resistance, good conductivity and stable branch connection.
items.material: Sizes and material can be confirmed according to conductor section and project drawings.
items.application: Conductor jointing, branch connection and distribution network upgrading.
items.packing: Please contact us for technical details.
items.customers: For EPC contractors, installers and distributors.
items.details: Other parallel groove models can be supplied according to project demand.

items.name: Insulation Piercing Grounding Clamp
items.summary: Grounding connection product for insulated conductors.
items.features: Reduced stripping work, faster installation and reliable grounding connection.
items.material: Insulated housing with metallic piercing and grounding connection structure.
items.application: Grounding connection for insulated conductors, temporary grounding and live-line work support.
items.packing: Please contact us for technical details.
items.customers: Distribution line construction and maintenance teams.
items.details: Final parameters should be confirmed by voltage level, conductor section and field use.

items.name: Safety & Equipment Sign
items.summary: Includes phase sequence signs, PVC safety signs, enamel signs, aluminum alloy signs, FRP signs and stainless steel signs.
items.features: Clear identification, durable outdoor use and customizable warning content.
items.material: PVC, enamel, aluminum alloy, FRP and 304 stainless steel options are shown in the catalogue.
items.application: Electrical safety warning, equipment identification and site safety management.
items.packing: Packing: 100 pcs / woven bag, 500 pcs / carton.
items.customers: Power utilities, contractors, maintenance teams and distributors.
items.details: Vietnamese / English content, reflective film, UV printing, screen printing and custom sizes can be supported.

items.name: General Safety Helmet
items.summary: ABS material and fiberglass material options. ABS includes V-shape, single-rib ventilated and single-rib non-ventilated types.
items.features: ABS: lightweight and impact resistant. Fiberglass: higher rigidity and durable shell.
items.material: ABS engineering plastic or fiberglass reinforced plastic.
items.application: Power construction, line maintenance, outdoor maintenance and industrial job sites.
items.packing: Please contact us for technical details.
items.customers: Power construction teams, maintenance teams and project procurement.
items.details: Fiberglass material has no separate model classification in the catalogue.

seo.keywords: power line hardware, strain clamp, parallel groove clamp, insulation piercing clamp, electrical safety sign, safety helmet, Vietnam power project, electrical equipment supplier
